title: Help, I Shrunk My Parents
original_title: Hilfe, ich hab meine Eltern geschrumpft
overview: Felix's school is haunted again, only this time it's not the benevolent spirit of school founder Otto Leonhard and the nuisance he caused, but the once hated and long-since dead Director Hulda Stingbeard. A coincidence causes the former shrunken and skeletonized school principle to rise again, leading to chaos...
